assessment.focus_note: Continued synthesis for 'Veritas Lens v0.1 Specification', focusing on geopolitical claims regarding the Strait of Hormuz and infrastructure attacks in Iran, assessing the politicization of scientific evidence in space exploration discourse, and analyzing immigration policy impacts on national control. I will also monitor the evolving narratives around global power realignments and foreign influence in US policymaking, and verify new claims regarding global oil control and military actions.
